text:
Once upon a time there was a brave little squirrel named Sandy. She lived in a Whispering Woods filled with all kinds of animals. Sandy loved exploring and gathering acorns. Every day she scoured the forest floor for treasures.

One day, Sandy discovered a secret glade lit by tiny, glowing fireflies. Intrigued, she crawled into a hollow oak where the light played beautifully. She settled in and discovered a magic book tucked inside. As she flipped its ancient pages, she learned that she had the power to change the forest. Each time she closed the book, something wonderful would happen.

Sandy started by transforming the dreary gray leaves into shining gold. Birds sang more beautifully. Flowers bloomed into dazzling displays. Soon, the woods felt brighter and happier. But she wondered what she could change next.

One twilight, a lonely deer named Debra wandered by, her fur gray as the forest canopy. She longed for something more. With a fluttery heart, Sandy changed
